title: failure-modes.yaml
description: Living taxonomy of observed failure modes for a recipe. The spine of the recipe's evals (Hamel Husain). Open list: agents propose new modes; humans approve.

id.description: Stable identifier. Referenced from tasks.jsonl `failure_modes_targeted` and from annotations.

name.description: Short noun phrase. Should fit in a one-key-per-mode annotator UI label.

description.description: One paragraph explaining what the failure looks like, how a human recognizes it, and why it matters.

example_trace_ids.description: Up to a handful of representative trace IDs (Langfuse). Updated as the mode is re-observed.

status.description: proposed = agent-proposed, awaiting human approval; active = approved and in use; retired = no longer observed in N weeks (kept for archaeology).

approved_by.description: Human reviewer who promoted from `proposed` to `active`.

related_aio_defects.description: AIO Tests / Jira defect keys linked to this failure mode.
